message:
chore: refresh telemetry bridge verification artifacts with expanded test coverage (bd-1now.4.6 + bd-1now.4.7)

bd-1now.4.6 (telemetry bridge E2E suite):
- Refresh all 13 stage_outputs/ with expanded test output from the
  strengthened owned-worker telemetry bridge, including abnormal_exit,
  backpressure, clippy_output, event_fields, key_format, multi_conn,
  multi_event, normal_lifecycle, oversized_reject, stale_recovery,
  transitions, unit_test_output, and worker_cleanup scenarios
- Update telemetry_e2e_log.jsonl, stage_results.jsonl, summary.json,
  and summary.md with current run results

bd-1now.4.7 (telemetry perf suite):
- Refresh telemetry_perf_log.jsonl, raw_output.txt, summary.json, and
  summary.md with latest performance measurement run results

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
